meta.title: Popping the HYPE BUBBLE around drones on the battlefield
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

A lot of the internet is not going to like this, but I want to try to have a nuanced conversation about how warfare is changing in the age of drones.

Read “I Fought in Ukraine and Here’s Why FPV Drones Kind of Suck,” by Jakum Jajcay on War on the Rocks:
https://warontherocks.com/2025/06/i-fought-in-ukraine-and-heres-why-fpv-drones-kind-of-suck/
